changeSet.author: George
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, about_me, average_rating) VALUES ( 'admin', 'admin@test.com', '$2a$10$2HkAMwlOxhj5lt96c2SzM.3vqSPteG3Aj3xSue/WS1.mzqvnQqq1y', 'Default administrator account', 0.0 );
INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u CROSS JOIN roles r WHERE u.username = 'admin' AND r.name = 'ROLE_ADMIN';
